design_plan: rng=42; hero_math=1120px max-width, 2–3 lines; AIDA_pass=true; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; label_sweep=all competitors mentioned; button_contrast=black/white verified
headline: Super vs Folk — Personal AI Agents Compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Folk. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Folk

summary: A fair, evidence‑based comparison of Super and Folk for people choosing a personal AI agent. Folk sits within the broader automation and agent ecosystem, while Super is purpose‑built for real computer use — with a reusable computer-use cache that makes repeated workflows faster and cheaper over time. This page also situates Folk and Super within the wider landscape alongside Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok.
